popularStory.headline: My Maternal 15th. Great Scottish Grandmother, Catherine MacPhee (MacDonald)
popularStory.description:
Name: Catherine MacPhee, of Lochaber, daughter of Angus MacPhee, of Lochaber and Christian Thompson
Born: 1395 in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland
Married: about 1440 in Scotland to Angus MacDonald …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch於1390年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申時，他的父親Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch25歲，母親Margaret Lennox12歲。他於1440年之前與Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1452年登記服兵役。他去世於1484年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾費爾希特享年94歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch于1390年出生在苏格兰洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申时，他的父亲Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch25岁，母亲Margaret Lennox12岁。他于1440年之前与Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1452年登记服兵役。他去世于1484年在苏格兰音巴內-爾費爾希特享年94岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Scottish Gaelic name Aonghas . Though still having a Scottish flavour, it has been used increasingly in modern times also by people without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Aonghas
meanings: Pronounced ‘een-yis’; from Celtic words meaning ‘one’ and ‘choice’. This is the name of an ancient Celtic god, and is first recorded as a personal name in Adomnan's ‘Life of St Columba’, where it occurs in the form Oinogus(s)ius as the name of a man for whom the saint prophesied a long life and a peaceful death. This is also almost certainly the name of the 8th-century Pictish king variously recorded as Onnust and Hungus.

meanings: Apparently a short form of any of the given names ending in these letters, for example,   Fiona   and   Anona  , now well established as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch was born in 1390, in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Lennox, was 12. He married Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean before 1440, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1452. He died in 1484, in Fersit, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 94, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch est né en 1390, à Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lennox, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean avant 1440, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1452. Il est décédé en 1484, à Fersit, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch 1390 in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Lennox 12. Er hat vor 1440 in Scotland Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1452 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1484 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Fersit, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch è nato il nel 1390 nel Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lennox, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean prima del 1440, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1452. Morì nel 1484, nel Fersit, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppochが1390年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアクイル オフ ロチャルッシュで生まれた時，父Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppochは25歳，母Margaret Lennoxは12歳であった。1440年以前にスコットランドでCatherine MacPhee of Glen Speanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年に兵役登録をした。彼は1484年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアフエルシトで94歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch(이)가 1390년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 키일 프 럭알시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lennox(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1440년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1484년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 퍼짓에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch nasceu em 1390, em Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lennox, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean antes 1440, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1452. Ele faleceu em 1484, em Fersit, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch родился в 1390 г. в местности кил оф лочолш, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lennox, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean перед 1440 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1452 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1484 г. в местности фирсит, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angus - Aonghas na Feairte MacDonald 2nd of Keppoch nació en 1390, en Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Lennox, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Catherine MacPhee of Glen Spean antes de 1440, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1452. Murió en 1484, en Fersit, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
